Built Mission Control dashboard with Kanban, calendar, project panels, session log, and live memory sync. Cleared 8 completed tasks and added 5 new ones.

title: Budget summary sent + backup fixed + gateway outage resolved
summary: Metro Lagoons budget summary built and sent to Jonathan Kelly ($100K net savings). Fixed nightly backup script — now uploads to both HI Drive and personal Drive. Gateway outage root cause found: Mac reboot after software update, Amphetamine not in Login Items. Fixed. OpenClaw updated to 2026.3.12.

title: Tiki hut permits + security podium + Decoscape PPT
summary: Researched FL §553.73(10)(i) chickee exemption — documented 3 client options. Built permit options report (MD + PDF), uploaded to Drive. Dispatched Picker for security podium sourcing — 3 options found, trade inquiry drafted to The Security Station. Redesigned Decoscape Sectional Sofa v1 → v2 PPT. Drafted tiki hut email to Jonathan Kelly.
decisions: HI only covers Option 2 (Indian exemption cert) or Option 3 (build without docs)
Option choice belongs to client, not HI
openItems: Tiki hut email awaiting Shameen send

title: All cron jobs fixed after gateway failure
summary: All 8 cron jobs were failing after Sunday Mar 8 setup. Root cause: timeoutSeconds in wrong location, channel routing wrong for Discord/Telegram. Fixed all jobs. Confirmed crypto-signal-alert healthy. March 9 journal written to #ava-journal.
decisions: timeoutSeconds lives inside payload object, not top-level
FF&E agent jobs → Discord; Ava's own ops jobs → Telegram
